name: Food Rations
description: Preserved food packages. Essential for survival, always in demand.

name: Basic Medicine
description: Antibiotics, painkillers, bandages. A lifeline for remote settlements.

name: Purified Water
description: Containers of clean water. Heavy but critical in arid regions.

name: Salvaged Electronics
description: Circuit boards, radios, power cells. Precious in the post-collapse world.

name: Machinery Parts
description: Engine components, generators, pumps. Heavy and hard to move.

name: Aviation Fuel
description: Refined fuel for aircraft. Dangerous to transport but highly valuable.

name: Pre-War Artifact
description: Relics from before the collapse. Collectors and scholars pay well.

name: Ammunition
description: Rifle rounds and shells. Illegal in Republic territory but traded everywhere else.
